## Melon Mod Manager 1.7.9

Tag: `v1.7.9`

This 1.7.9 release is a cleanup and polish update focused on the About dialog, release metadata, and small UI maintenance around the welcome flow.

### Fixes and improvements

- Removed the welcome guide entry from the About dialog so it is no longer exposed in the normal release UI.
- Merged the About dialog version and release date into a single cleaner line.
- Replaced the hardcoded welcome badge version text with the actual app version at runtime.
- Reused a shared package info provider for version and release date labels instead of fetching package metadata separately.
- Updated app and installer metadata for `1.7.9`.

### Included assets

- Windows installer (`MelonModManager-Win64-Setup-1.7.9.exe`)
- Portable Windows build (`melon_mod_manager_windows_portable.zip`)
- Linux package (`MelonModManager-Linux-Setup-1.7.9.tar.gz`)
- Checksums (`SHA256SUMS.txt`, `SHA256SUMS-linux.txt`)
